## Summary

Short description of the task and its purpose.

## Goal

Explain the intended outcome and why this task exists.

## Scope

Clearly define what is included and what is not included in this task.

## Implementation

List concrete implementation steps if applicable.

Example:

- Step 1
- Step 2
- Step 3

## Affected Areas

List relevant system areas or labels.

Example:

- area:repo
- area:web
- area:api

## Acceptance Criteria

The task is complete when:

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Notes

Optional context, references, or links.
